name: Ab Aeterno
explicitMods: (100-150)% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield
(10-10)% less Movement and Skill Speed per Dodge Roll in the past 20 seconds
flavorText: His enemy was for endurance forged. His own waned.

name: Adonia's Ego
explicitMods: +(3-3) to Level of all Spell Skills
(-10--10)% to all Elemental Resistances per Power Charge
flavorText:
Adonia rose with eyes afire, emanating a ghastly aura, and
broke off a carving from the wall of the Throne Room.
"You think me powerless without my wand? Insult me again!"

name: Aerisvane's Wings
flavorText: The strongest souls are forged through struggle and defeat.

name: Against the Darkness
explicitMods: Notable Passive Skills in Radius also grant +1% to Maximum Fire Resistance
Notable Passive Skills in Radius also grant +1% to Maximum Chaos Resistance
flavorText: After the fires, in the depths of the Winter of the World, all life in the Vastiri banded together. Whether serpent, hyena, human, or golem, hated enemies clasped hand to claw, built refuge, and fought side by side against the Abyssals. Thus, the Third Pact was born.

name: Alkem Eira
explicitMods: Damage Blocked is Recouped as Mana
flavorText: May your resolve never waver.

name: Alpha's Howl
flavorText:
Nature respects the strong
And paints the snow red
With the blood of the weak

name: Amor Mandragora
explicitMods: Enemies in your Presence are Hindered
Gain (20-20) Druidic Prowess for every 20 total Rage spent
flavorText:
A sensitive few among the first settlers of Ezomyr
followed the wisps by canoe. On a misty forested
island, Cirel of Tarth stood waiting to greet them.

name: Andvarius
flavorText: Danger is the price of wealth.

name: Apep's Supremacy
explicitMods: (30-50)% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
(20-20)% of Elemental damage from Hits taken as Chaos damage
(100-100)% chance to Poison on Hit with Spell Damage
flavorText: Give him your body, and your burdens will follow.

name: Apron of Emiran
explicitMods: (-60--40)% reduced Duration of Bleeding on You
flavorText:
"Prepare the rack, boy. And be careful with those hooks!"
- the Master Torturer's last words

name: Arakaali's Gift
explicitMods: Recover Life equal to (15-20)% of Mana Flask's Recovery Amount when used
Recover Mana equal to (15-20)% of Life Flask's Recovery Amount when used
flavorText:
Devotees of the Goddess of Lust
needed never fear her sting.

name: Arvil's Wheel
explicitMods: Lose (-1--1)% of maximum Life on Kill
Lose (-1--1)% of maximum Mana on Kill
flavorText:
The unending carnage of war
mercilessly grinds away
at body and mind.

name: Ashrend
explicitMods: (-10--10) Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits
flavorText: The blasted oak stands forever.

name: Asphyxia's Wrath
implicitMods: Adds (3-3) to 3 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitMods: Adds (5-8) to 5 Cold damage to Attacks
Enemies Chilled by your Hits increase damage taken by Chill Magnitude
Attacks Gain (5-10)% of Damage as Extra Cold Damage
flavorText:
Mist of breath
Icing to lips and throat
As the warm ones choke and fall
Upon the frozen wasteland.

name: Assailum
explicitMods: Skills have a (100-150)% longer Perfect Timing window
flavorText: A moment of calm before the battle can end the war.

name: Astramentis
explicitMods: (-4--4) Physical Damage taken from Attack Hits
flavorText:
Mindless rage will shake the world,
Cunning lies will bend it.
Reckless haste will break the world,
And into darkness send it.

name: Atsak's Sight
flavorText:
Remaining unseen, the Dishonoured Assassin struck
only in the depths of the harshest sandstorms.

name: Atziri's Acuity
explicitMods: Leech from Critical Hits is instant
flavorText:
"The heart is the herald. 
It will tell me when it is best to strike."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

name: Atziri's Contempt
explicitMods: Spear Skills inflict a Bloodstone Lance on Hit, up to a maximum of 30 on each target
flavorText:
"My people? I'm not doing this for them.
They belong to me. They want this for me.
Their sacrifice is a gift they give out of love
and adoration... I deserve it. I am their Queen."

name: Atziri's Disdain
explicitMods: (10-10)% of Damage taken bypasses Energy Shield
Gain (10-15)% of maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield
flavorText:
They screamed her name in adulation as they gave
their very lives. She looked on with impatience.

name: Atziri's Rule
explicitMods: +(3-5) to Level of all Corrupted Spell Skill Gems
Spells which cost Life Gain (80-120)% of Damage as Extra Physical Damage
flavorText: Bow before her... or suffer the most gruelling death imaginable.

name: Atziri's Splendour
implicitMods: +(1-1) to Level of all Corrupted Skill Gems
explicitMods: Only Soul Cores can be Socketed in this item
This item gains bonuses from Socketed Soul Cores as though it was also a Shield
(80-120)% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield
Skills from Corrupted Gems have (50-50)% of Mana Costs Converted to Life Costs
flavorText:
"When you have nothing to hide,
you have nothing to fear."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

name: Atziri's Step
explicitMods: Gain Deflection Rating equal to (40-60)% of Evasion Rating
(-12--6)% to amount of Damage Prevented by Deflection
Cannot be Light Stunned by Deflected Hits
flavorText:
"Those who dance are considered insane
by those who cannot hear the music."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

name: Aurseize
explicitMods: Lose (-2--2)% of maximum Life on Kill
flavorText: Wealth is not to be borne lightly.

name: Beacon of Azis
explicitMods: Critical Hits ignore Enemy Monster Elemental Resistances
flavorText:
The homeguard signalled for aid against a surprise attack,
but it was not their dekharas that responded.
It was Solerai herself.

name: Beetlebite
explicitMods: Aggravate Bleeding on Enemies when they Enter your Presence
flavorText:
They crawl and chitter and swarm
in the shadow of his presence.

name: Beira's Anguish
explicitMods: (20-25)% Chance to gain a Charge when you kill an enemy
Creates Ignited Ground for (500-500) seconds when used, Igniting enemies as though dealing Fire damage equal to 500% of your maximum Life
flavorText:
They found a crying child tied to a frozen pyre.
She was clad in ice, but the village was ash.

name: Belly of the Beast
explicitMods: Life Recovery from Flasks is instant
flavorText:
There is no safer place
Than the Belly of the Beast

name: Berek's Grip
explicitMods: Hits against you have (-50--35)% reduced Critical Hit Chance while you are Chilled

Wind Skills which can be boosted by Elemental Ground Surfaces count
as being boosted by Shocked Ground
flavorText:
"Berek hid from Storm's lightning wrath
In the embrace of oblivious Frost
Repelled by ice, blinded by blizzards
Storm raged in vain
While Berek slept."
- Berek and the Untamed

name: Berek's Pass
explicitMods: Regenerate (1-2).5% of maximum Life per second while Ignited

Wind Skills which can be boosted by Elemental Ground Surfaces count
as being boosted by Chilled Ground
flavorText:
"From Frost's ice-bound pass
Berek taunted and jeered
Until furious Flame scaled the mountain
Berek escaped through the thaw
And Frost's tortured moans."
- Berek and the Untamed

name: Berek's Respite
explicitMods: (15-25)% increased Critical Damage Bonus while Shocked

Wind Skills which can be boosted by Elemental Ground Surfaces count
as being boosted by Ignited Ground
flavorText:
"With Flame licking at his heels
Berek berated the clouds
Until vengeful Storm spewed forth his rains
And Berek held on tight
As Fire screamed and steamed
And fled."
- Berek and the Untamed

name: Beyond Reach
implicitMods: (20-30)% increased Critical Hit Chance for Attacks
explicitMods: Chaos Damage from Hits also Contributes to Freeze Buildup
Chaos Damage from Hits also Contributes to Electrocute Buildup
Attacks Gain (10-20)% of Physical Damage as extra Chaos Damage
flavorText:
The limit of our knowledge is a barrier
that protects us from ourselves.

name: Bijouborne
flavorText: Trifle not with the trinket mage.

name: Birth of Fury
explicitMods: Drop Ignited Ground while moving, which lasts (10-10) seconds and Ignites as though dealing Fire Damage equal to 10% of your maximum Life
flavorText:
As the sun rises and the light approaches,
so too shall your enemies fear you.

name: Birthright Buckle
explicitMods: Life Flasks used while on Low Life apply Recovery Instantly
Mana Flasks used while on Low Mana apply Recovery Instantly
flavorText: Some families have peculiar gifts...

name: Bitterbloom
explicitMods: Energy Shield Recharge starts when you use a Mana Flask
flavorText: The soul cannot flourish in a doubting mind.

name: Black Sun Crest
flavorText:
The beasts we fear the most
are the ones who dwell in total darkness.

name: Blackbraid
explicitMods: +(100-150)% of Armour also applies to Elemental Damage
flavorText: An Ezomyte endures.

name: Blackflame
explicitMods: Enemies Ignited by you take Chaos Damage instead of Fire Damage from Ignite
flavorText:
Beyond the veil of death, there burns a fire
by whose light night is borne.

name: Blackgleam
implicitMods: Adds (5-5) to 5 Fire damage to Attacks
explicitMods: Adds (6-9) to 7 Fire damage to Attacks
Attacks Gain (5-10)% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
flavorText:
Molten feathers, veiled spark,
Hissing arrows from the dark.

name: Blackheart
implicitMods: Adds (4-4) to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitMods: Adds (8-10) to 10 Chaos Damage to Attacks
(25-25)% chance to Intimidate Enemies for 4 seconds on Hit
flavorText: Fear is highly infectious.

name: Blessed Bonds
explicitMods: Inflict Cold Exposure on Igniting an Enemy
Inflict Fire Exposure on Shocking an Enemy
Inflict Lightning Exposure on Critical Hit
flavorText:
"We survived the endless winter.
We endure the long summer.
One day, spring will return the rains."

name: Blistering Bond
explicitMods: You take Fire Damage instead of Physical Damage from Bleeding
flavorText:
"The Brotherhood of Silence does not set out to torture our targets.
Excruciating pain is simply a byproduct of certain... necessary methods."

name: Blood of the Warrior
explicitMods: Effect is not removed when Unreserved Life is Filled
25% of Damage taken during effect Recouped as Life
Gain 4 Rage when Hit by an Enemy during effect
No Inherent loss of Rage during effect
flavorText:
"Tukohama may be asleep, but he still gives us his strength. A small
needle, an offering, and a vial... drink deeply, my son, and you
will more than survive the coming battle... you will thrive."

name: Blood Price
explicitMods: Enemies in your Presence have at least (10-10)% of Life Reserved
flavorText: An eye for an eye makes the whole world dead.

name: Bloodbarrier
explicitMods:
Inflict Corrupted Blood for (50-50) seconds on Block, dealing 50% of
your maximum Life as Physical damage per second
flavorText:
A window onto a realm of red,
where countless voices scream...

name: Blueflame Bracers
explicitMods: (100-100)% of Fire Damage Converted to Cold Damage
flavorText: The secret was lost with its maker.

name: Bones of Ullr
explicitMods: (20-30)% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills which create Undead Minions
flavorText:
The dead man walks where
the living fear to tread.

name: Brain Rattler
explicitMods: All damage with this Weapon causes Electrocution buildup
flavorText: The mind may have no limits, but the skull sure does.

name: Bramblejack
explicitMods: (250-250)% of Melee Physical Damage taken reflected to Attacker
Regenerate (5-5)% of maximum Life per second while Surrounded
flavorText: It is safer to be feared than to be loved.

name: Breath of the Mountains
implicitMods: Used when you take Cold damage from a Hit
explicitMods: Grants a Power Charge on use
flavorText:
"To scrape the sky,
to touch the clouds themselves,
is to know true freedom."
- Mutewind saying

name: Briarpatch
flavorText: The druids walk the Grelwood without fear.

name: Briskwrap
explicitMods: Gain Deflection Rating equal to (20-30)% of Evasion Rating
flavorText:
"I carry neither food nor drink. I rely on the charity
of my fellow wayfarers. Dead men are generous men."
- Taruk of the Wildmen

name: Bristleboar
explicitMods: Gain (5-5) Rage when Hit by an Enemy
Gain (10-10) Rage when Critically Hit by an Enemy
flavorText: When cornered and desperate, look within for the rage to break loose.

name: Bronzebeard
explicitMods: (50-35)% reduced Effect of Chill on you
(50-35)% reduced Magnitude of Ignite on you
(50-35)% reduced effect of Shock on you
flavorText: Heavy is the head.

name: Brutus' Lead Sprinkler
explicitMods: Hits with this Weapon have (5-5)% chance to Trigger Molten Shower per 25 Strength
(10-10) to 10 Added Attack Fire Damage per 25 Strength
flavorText:
"A sprinkle of liquid encouragement is often
required to garnish the perfect confession."
- Brutus, Warden of Axiom

name: Brynabas
flavorText: The Brinerot sail without fear of storms.

name: Brynhand's Mark
flavorText: The mark of the smith was widely known.

name: Bursting Decay
explicitMods: Lose (5-5)% of maximum Life per second
Attacks have added Physical damage equal to (3-3)% of maximum Life
flavorText:
"All Beidat desires is a foothold, a grip on your flesh,
on the world... he will offer you anything to get it..."
- Rantings of a Templar prisoner, page thirty

name: Bushwhack
flavorText:
Banished for his tragic failure,
Erian learned to hunt to survive.

name: Byrnabas
flavorText: The Brinerot sail without fear of storms.

name: Cadiro's Gambit
explicitMods: Each Arrow fired is a Crescendo, Splinter, Reversing, Diamond, Covetous, or Blunt Arrow
flavorText:
"One can never fully eliminate Chance, but with the right
machinations, all the outcomes may be turned in your favour..."
- Cadiro Perandus

name: Calgyra's Arc
flavorText: "There is nowhere my vengeance cannot find you."

name: Call of the Brotherhood
explicitMods: (100-100)% of Lightning Damage Converted to Cold Damage
flavorText:
Forged by three brothers
so that they may recognize each other
across any distance of time or travel.

name: Candlemaker
flavorText: You can be the wick or the wax. Either way, your light goes out and mine goes on.

name: Carnage Heart
flavorText:
Forged from the blood of countless wars, 
its thirst has only begun.

name: Carrion Call
explicitMods: Minions' Resistances are equal to yours
flavorText: Obedience stretches beyond the grave.

name: Cat O' Nine Tails
explicitMods: Regenerate (5-5)% of maximum Life per second if you have been Hit Recently
Life Recovery other than Flasks cannot Recover Life to above Low Life
Gain Physical Thorns damage equal to (12-12)% - 12% of maximum Life
flavorText:
A Templar thinks he's righteous for flogging
himself once for every ten lashings he gives.

name: Chainsting
explicitMods: All Damage from Hits with this Weapon Contributes to Pin Buildup
(20-30)% increased Projectile Speed with this Weapon
flavorText: The Sacred Hunt ends with mercy.

name: Chernobog's Pillar
explicitMods: Gain 1% of damage as Fire damage per 1% Chance to Block
flavorText:
Fire dances with those who doubt
Licks the skin and flesh from the fearful
Where there is no fear
There is no flame

name: Chober Chaber
explicitMods: Increases and Reductions to Minion Damage also affect you
flavorText: The faithful may continue to serve, even after death.

name: Choir of the Storm
explicitMods: Critical Hits Ignore Enemy Monster Lightning Resistance
Trigger Lightning Bolt Skill on Critical Hit
flavorText:
But the fool did not bow.
The fool stood and questioned.
And the fool was unwritten.

name: Clear Skies
implicitMods:
Adds a Mirror of Delirium to a Map 
(5-5) uses remaining
explicitMods: Delirium Fog in your Maps never dissipates
Delirium in Map increases (-10-10)% faster with distance from the mirror
flavorText:
A simple instruction that will purify an entire region,
making it safe and kind for weary travellers.

name: Cloak of Defiance
explicitMods: (50-50)% of Damage is taken from Mana before Life
flavorText:
When the throat roars,
As eyes weep,
When the hand grips hard
With trembling fingers,
When belly twists
Yet legs stand strong,
That is the work
Of the Defiant Heart.

name: Cloak of Flame
explicitMods: (50-50)% of Physical Damage taken as Fire Damage
flavorText: He who sows an ember shall reap an inferno.

name: Coat of Red
explicitMods: (25-25)% chance to be inflicted with Bleeding when Hit
flavorText:
For those noble families obsessed
with keeping their bloodline pure,
there was a price to pay...

name: Collapsing Horizon
explicitMods: +(2-4) to Level of all Elemental Skills
Trigger skills refund half of Energy spent
flavorText: The edges bend, the world flexes, the infinite spills into view.

name: Constricting Command
explicitMods: Pin Enemies which are Primed for Pinning
flavorText:
"Be vigilant, Nezahul! When the serpent is cornered, does it give up?
No... It waits. Then it bites the first hand it finds. 
The danger of numbers is all in your mind!"
- Viper Napuatzi, instructing Royal Commander Nezahul

name: Controlled Metamorphosis
explicitMods: Only affects Passives in Very Large Ring
Passives in Radius can be Allocated without being connected to your tree
flavorText:
Our world was dying, but we chose to survive.
We broke free from the chains within.

name: Cornathaum
flavorText: Pain brings clarity.

name: Corona of the Red Sun
explicitMods: Leeching Life from your Hits causes Allies in your Presence to also Leech the same amount of Life
flavorText:
Only the High Priests could enact the sacrifices,
but all who witnessed shared in exultation.

name: Corpsewade
flavorText: Natural decay can be twisted to dark ends.

name: Cospri's Will
explicitMods: Curses you inflict have infinite Duration
Curses you inflict can affect Hexproof Enemies
Withered you inflict has infinite Duration
flavorText:
Curse their vile Council,
They cast me aside as if I am some bastard child.
If they only knew the power I possess.

name: Couture of Crimson
explicitMods: Life Leech can Overflow Maximum Life
(-60--40)% reduced Duration of Bleeding on You
flavorText:
It is often said of nobles that they live off their
peasants... sometimes, it's truer than any suspect.

name: Coward's Legacy
explicitMods: (30-40)% increased Life and Mana Recovery from Flasks
You are considered on Low Life while at (75-75)% of maximum Life or below instead
flavorText:
Death is your most important duty.
Face it, or curse your bloodline for all eternity.

name: Cracklecreep
explicitMods: Ignites you inflict spread to other Enemies that stay within 1.5 metres for 1 second
flavorText: Fear the fire that spreads like a plague.

name: Crest of Ardura
flavorText:
When the Red Sekhema called,
the Ardura were the first to answer.

name: Crown of Eyes
explicitMods: Increases and Reductions to Spell damage also apply to Attacks
flavorText:
Turning, gazing, blinking,
behold the eyes of void.
Burning, razing, drinking,
your mind is destroyed.

name: Crown of the Pale King
explicitMods: Thorns can Retaliate against all Hits
flavorText:
A lightless world
a silent reign
two sightless eyes
feed on your pain.

name: Crown of the Victor
flavorText: An endless river of bodies lie in the wake of ambition.

name: Crown of Thorns
explicitMods: Lose (5-5) Life when you use a Skill
flavorText:
Lift it lightly, don it slow.
The spikes point out and in, you know.

name: Cruel Hegemony
implicitMods:
Empowers the Map Boss of a Map 
(5-5) uses remaining
flavorText:
The lash of the whip,
the ire of the tithe...
the press of the boot.

name: Cursecarver
flavorText: Lost in the Black Fen, Erian hoped that dawn would save him. He had no idea how far away the light truly was.

name: Daevata's Wind
implicitMods: (25-35)% increased Projectile Speed with this Weapon
explicitMods: (30-60)% increased Melee Damage if you've dealt a Projectile Attack Hit in the past eight seconds
(30-60)% increased Projectile Damage if you've dealt a Melee Hit in the past eight seconds
flavorText:
"You killed their Golden Sekhema. The Maraketh will think of nothing
but vengeance now." - Dimos, Advisor to General Titucius

name: Darkness Enthroned
explicitMods: This item gains bonuses from Socketed Items as though it was Gloves
flavorText:
Kulemak sat triumphant, raising the crown.
Darkness coiled the world in eternal night.
Victory, a mere moment, came crashing down.
No conqueror, no conquered, only searing Light.

name: Darkray Vectors
explicitMods: (5-5)% increased Movement Speed per Frenzy Charge
flavorText:
"Sirrius flew on wings of light, faster than wind, faster
than thought. But try as he might to outrun the darkness,
it was there, at every turn, waiting for him."
- Azmerian legend

name: Death Articulated
explicitMods: Lose (5-5).3% of maximum Life per second
flavorText:
"The mind at the center of the swarm... K'Tash does
the thinking... but it has only one thought... hate."
- Rantings of a Templar prisoner, page ninety-four

name: Death Rush
explicitMods: Leech (5-5)% of Physical Attack Damage as Life
You gain Onslaught for (4-4) seconds on Kill
flavorText: To truly appreciate life you must be there when it ends

name: Death's Harp
implicitMods: +(50-50)% Surpassing chance to fire an additional Arrow
flavorText:
The mournful music of the strings,
The creaking arch, the arrow sings.
A choking cry, a rattled breath,
The Reaper's Song, the Harp of Death.

name: Deathblow
flavorText: Anticipation is a gift.

name: Deathrattle
explicitMods: (20-20)% chance for Energy Shield Recharge to start when you Kill an Enemy
flavorText: The cry of death whispers in the wind.

name: Decree of Acuity
explicitMods: Gain (15-30)% of Evasion Rating as extra Armour
The Effect of Blind on you is reversed
flavorText:
"Focus. Hone your mind. Your lessers rely on the tangible.
Shed your senses, and raze them from this physical realm."

name: Decree of Flight
explicitMods: Gain Guard equal to (10-20)% of missing Energy Shield for 4 seconds when you Dodge Roll
Maximum amount of Guard is based on maximum Energy Shield instead
flavorText:
"Soar. Be swift. Let none trespass here, from
above or below, lest your purpose be forfeit."

name: Decree of Loyalty
explicitMods: Convert 1% of maximum Life to twice as much Armour per 1% Chaos Resistance above 0%
Defend with (150-200)% of Armour while you have Energy Shield
Damage over Time cannot bypass your Energy Shield
flavorText:
"Hold firm. Let no word but the Mothers' turn your head.
Through your unfaltering fealty, you achieve perfection."

name: Defiance of Destiny
explicitMods: Recover (20-30)% of Missing Life before being Hit by an Enemy
flavorText:
The respect of Karui warriors is hard to earn,
but lasts a lifetime... and beyond.

name: Deidbell
explicitMods: Warcries Explode Corpses dealing (10-10)% of their Life as Physical Damage
Warcry Skills have (20-30)% increased Area of Effect
flavorText: May you never hear it toll.

name: Demon Stitcher
explicitMods: Sacrifice (5-15)% of Life to gain that much Energy Shield when you Cast a Spell
flavorText:
Xibaqua's treachery was met with divine fury.
One by one, the gods reclaimed their flesh,
until all that remained was a droplet of pure light:
The first Vaal.

name: Dionadair
explicitMods: Double Stun Threshold while Shield is Raised
flavorText:
Praetor Draven knew his only chance to subjugate
the Ezomytes was to catch them unaware.

name: Doedre's Damning
explicitMods: You can apply an additional Curse
flavorText: Where her mouth should have been there was only a whirling, black void.

name: Doedre's Tenure
flavorText:
While Doedre lacked Maligaro's sense of style,
she surpassed her master in pure malevolence.

name: Doomfletch
explicitMods: Attacks with this Weapon gain (100-100)% of Physical damage as Extra damage of each Element
flavorText:
"Toasted or frozen
Or twitching in the light
I'm not fussy
And neither is Death."
- Koralus Doomfletch

name: Doomgate
explicitMods: You take (25-40)% of damage from Blocked Hits
flavorText: Welcome to Wraeclast.

name: Doryani's Prototype
explicitMods: +100% of Armour also applies to Lightning Damage
Enemies in your Presence have Lightning Resistance equal to yours
Lightning Resistance does not affect Lightning damage taken
flavorText:
"This was the first step in some grand design,
lost to the ages, now ours to decipher."
- Dominus, High Templar

name: Double Vision
explicitMods:
When you reload, triggers Gemini Surge to alternately
gain (2-6) Cold Surges or 5 Fire Surges
flavorText:
For those without a home in the Vastiri, the
hot day is harsh, but the chill night is far worse.

name: Dreadfist
flavorText: What is worse, the sting of the past, the pain of the present, or the fear of the future?

name: Dream Fragments
explicitMods: You cannot be Chilled or Frozen
flavorText:
Doryani stumbled into a realm of madness
And awoke its Master.

name: Drillneck
explicitMods: Gain Deflection Rating equal to (24-32)% of Evasion Rating
Attack Projectiles Return if they Pierced at least (2-4) times
Projectiles deal (42-64)% increased Damage with Hits for each time they have Pierced
Projectiles have (42-64)% increased Critical Hit chance for each time they have Pierced
flavorText:
"Why waste such a fine arrow on just one man?"
- Kiravi, Vaal Archer

name: Duality
explicitMods: Gain Finality for (0.5-0.5).5 seconds per Combo expended when using Skills
Gain (500-1000) Guard for 0.5 seconds per Combo expended when using Skills
flavorText:
Dannig saw Seren in his mind's eye, a public ornament of
extravagance. Until she bore Cadigan a son and vanished.
Decadence covering brutality, like all Kalguuran customs.

name: Dunkelhalt
explicitMods: You take (50-50)% of damage from Blocked Hits
flavorText:
"A thief in the night, Draven did creep,
families asleep, taken, held on high.
Clever, he thought, 'til his children paid.
Nay, villain, a man never bleeds alone."

name: Dusk Vigil
explicitMods: Gain (30-50)% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Trigger Ember Fusillade Skill on casting a Spell
flavorText: The candlemass tradition was born in a time of darkness and fear.

name: Dustbloom
explicitMods: 0.5% of maximum Life Regenerated per second per Fragile Regrowth
10% increased Mana Regeneration Rate per Fragile Regrowth
Lose all Fragile Regrowth when Hit
flavorText:
Wraeclast has suffered many great disasters,
but life always springs back anew.

name: Earthbound
explicitMods: Trigger Spark Skill on killing a Shocked Enemy
flavorText: An ancient Azmeri staff, overgrown by roots...

name: Edyrn's Tusks
explicitMods: (50-50)% chance to inflict Bleeding on Hit
(-50--50)% reduced Slowing Potency of Debuffs on You
flavorText:
In death, the legendary boar's tusks were turned
to the slaying of Phaaryl's Eternal oppressors.

name: Effigy of Cruelty
explicitMods: Critical Hits with Spells apply (1-3) Stack of Critical Weakness
flavorText:
The horrors we imagined as children
still exist somewhere in the dark...

name: Elevore
flavorText:
Ancient worshippers of the Greatwolf were overtaken
by a ravenous hunger for all things mystical.

name: Empire's Grasp
flavorText:
"I like my vassals at sword point,
but my enemies as close as the hilt."
- Emperor Chitus

name: Enezun's Charge
explicitMods: (30-50)% increased Critical Hit Chance for Spells
(25-25)% chance to not destroy Corpses when Consuming Corpses
flavorText: He alone was welcome in the sacred spaces of the Titans.

name: Enfolding Dawn
explicitMods: Gain no inherent bonus from Intelligence
flavorText: The gleam of the night and howling teeth alike could not abate the rising of the sun.

name: Erian's Cobble
flavorText:
Sometimes patching up your
equipment gets out of hand.

name: Eshtera's Path
explicitMods: You can only Socket Sapphire Jewels in this item
+(5-10)% to Fire and Cold Resistances per Equipped Item with a Lightning Resistance Modifier
flavorText:
During the Winter of the World, her akhara began
shepherding jingakh across the harsh Vastiri. Sekhema
Eshtera planted the seeds of Maraketh diplomacy.

name: Essentia Sanguis
explicitMods: Adds (30-50) to 33 Lightning damage to Attacks
Life Leech is Converted to Energy Shield Leech
flavorText:
The darkest clouds clashed and coupled,
giving birth to four lightning children of hate.

name: Eventide Petals
explicitMods: Ice Crystals have (-3-3)% increased maximum Life per 5% Cold Resistance you have
flavorText:
Dannig sculpted the Verisium to evoke the
night-blooming lotus of Middengard's stygian peaks,
which grow only where ash meets the snow and stars.

name: Evergrasping Ring
explicitMods: Allies in your Presence Gain (15-25)% of Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Enemies in your Presence Gain (6-12)% of Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
flavorText:
Power comes to those who seek
Death comes to those who reach

name: Eye of Chayula
flavorText: Never blinking, always watching.

name: Eyes of the Runefather
explicitMods: Inflicts Runefather's Challenge on enemies 6 metres in front of you when raised, no more than once every 2 seconds
Gain (10000-10000) Runefather's Boast per Power of targets affected by Runefather's Challenge you kill
flavorText:
From aeons past, Dannig felt the Runefather's
gaze, challenging him. There is no honour in ease.
True greatness is torn from the jaws of defeat.

name: Ezomyte Peak
flavorText:
Centuries of servitude, a day
of glory, an eternity of death.

name: Facebreaker
explicitMods: Has (4-4) to 12 Physical damage, +3 to +4 per Boss's Face Broken
+(0.3-0.3).3 metres to Melee Strike Range while Unarmed

Can Attack as though using a One Handed Mace while both of your hand slots are empty
Unarmed Attacks that would use an Equipped One Hand Mace's damage use this Item's damage
flavorText:
"You think us savages?" mused the Red Wolf, as
he pulled teeth from the Eternal's skull. "I will
show your kind the way of tooth and claw."

name: Fairgraves' Curse
explicitMods: Attack Hits inflict Spectral Fire for (8-8) seconds
flavorText:
The power of the Allflame rends
souls just as easily as flesh.

name: Feathered Fortress
explicitMods: No Movement Speed Penalty while Shield is Raised
flavorText: Ride the western wind, and take flight.

name: Fireflower
explicitMods: Take (100-100) Fire Damage when you Ignite an Enemy
+(1-4) to Level of all Fire Skills
flavorText:
Tale-women in training drink of a painful desert fruit.
Fire, they learn, springs from agony.

name: Fixation of Yix
explicitMods: Allies in your Presence have (30-50)% increased Critical Hit Chance
Allies in your Presence have (30-50)% increased Critical Damage Bonus
Allies in your Presence have (10-20)% increased Attack Speed
Allies in your Presence have (10-20)% increased Cast Speed
flavorText:
He knew not why he was changing, only
that he wanted to hold his family close...

name: Flesh Crucible
flavorText:
"Never mind the pain, it's only... making room. Unrelated fact,
a person can live a normal life with just one kidney. Or just one
lung. You never know what Vaal technology will cost you..."

name: Font of Power
explicitMods:
When a Party Member in your Presence Casts a Spell, you
Sacrifice (20-20)% of Mana and they Leech that Mana
flavorText:
Tale-women may not fight directly,
for they have a much higher purpose.

name: For Utopia
explicitMods: Defend with 200% of Armour during effect
flavorText:
"It may be centuries hence, but I still hold utmost faith.
The Saviour will rise, and mankind will be free."

name: Forbidden Gaze
flavorText:
Keep your heart as ice,
lest your passions stir.

name: Forgotten Warden
explicitMods: +(70-100) to Deflection Rating per 50 missing Energy Shield
(10-15)% of Damage from Deflected Hits is taken from Damageable Companion's Life before you
flavorText:
A gift from the Draíocht, lost in Darkness.
The bronze hums. The cloth sighs.
Living pieces of her, yearning to exist.

name: Forsaken Bangle
implicitMods: Used when you take Chaos damage from a Hit
explicitMods: (50-50)% of Chaos damage you prevent when Hit Recouped as Life and Mana during effect
flavorText:
Among the Templars, a secret few ate the sins of others.
They bore this burden to empower their hidden Order.

name: Foxshade
explicitMods: (10-10)% increased Movement Speed when on Full Life
(100-100)% increased Evasion Rating when on Full Life
flavorText: To catch an animal, think like an animal.

name: Freedom of Faith
implicitMods:
Adds Ritual Altars to a Map 
(5-5) uses remaining
explicitMods: Favours at Ritual Altars in Area costs (10-15)% increased Tribute
Can Reroll Favours at Ritual Altars in your Maps twice as many times
flavorText:
When darkness comes, we pray for light.
When darkness is all that there is,
we pray for death.

name: From Nothing
explicitMods:
Passives in Radius of Trusted Kinship can be Allocated
without being connected to your tree
flavorText:
They clawed their way up from the agonising depths of nonexistence,
breathing deep with joy the exquisite light of meaning.

name: Frostbreath
explicitMods: All Damage from Hits with this Weapon Contributes to Freeze Buildup
flavorText:
A merciful murderer swept through the streets of Sarn
Robbing breath from the weak and worthless.

name: Fury of the King
explicitMods: Bear Skills Convert (80-80)% of Physical Damage to Fire Damage
Skills which require Glory generate (2-5) Glory every 2 seconds
Enemies in your Presence have Exposure
flavorText:
Gruthkul was the Mother of Despair...
but one day, the Father will return,
and discover the fate of his children.

name: Gamblesprint
explicitMods: Gain (40-40)% to 40% increased Movement Speed at random when Hit, until Hit again
flavorText:
All your tomorrows lie ahead of you,
unknown and snarled to the very last.

name: Geofri's Sanctuary
explicitMods: Your maximum Energy Shield is equal to (200-300)% of your Strength
Maximum Energy Shield cannot be Converted
Regenerate (2-2) Life per second for every 10 Intelligence
flavorText:
Faith does not make us invulnerable.
It makes us immortal.

name: Ghostmarch
flavorText:
The cursed ones march forever,
On their hopeless, last endeavour.

name: Ghostwrithe
explicitMods: (35-35)% of Maximum Life Converted to Energy Shield
flavorText: Faith springs abundant at the edge of death.

name: Gifts from Above
explicitMods: (20-30)% increased Rarity of Items Dropped by Enemies killed with a Critical Hit
You have Consecrated Ground around you while stationary
flavorText: God blesses those who bless themselves.

name: Glimpse of Chaos
flavorText:
Man retains sanity and strives toward civilisation
only under the blessed veil of ignorance.

name: Gloamgown
explicitMods: Your base Energy Shield Recharge Delay is (10-10) seconds
flavorText: The tale-women of old knew how to build anticipation.

name: Gloomform
explicitMods: You have a Smoke Cloud around you while stationary
flavorText:
It was in this forsaken land, where mists shroud the world in mystery,
that thieves, murderers, and outcasts, sought refuge.

name: Glowswarm
explicitMods: Mana Flasks gain (0.17-0.25).18 charges per Second
flavorText:
As their eyes adjusted, they became aware of a strange
blue light. Countless glowing worms crawled above,
blissfully unaware of their flight from the sirens.

name: Goldrim
flavorText: No metal slips as easily through the fingers as gold.

name: Goregirdle
flavorText: Bleeding just means you're still alive.

name: Grand Spectrum
explicitMods: +(6-6)% to all Elemental Resistances per socketed Grand Spectrum
flavorText: Skin like steel tempered by bright flames.

name: Gravebind
explicitMods: Enemies in your Presence killed by anyone count as being killed by you instead
flavorText:
Try as you like to hide the
blood on your hands.
You'll still know the truth.

name: Greed's Embrace
flavorText:
Some would question if the risk was worth it.
The rest were already dead.

name: Greymake
flavorText: In the end, even heroes fade away.

name: Grip of Kulemak
explicitMods: Gain (8-12)% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Debuffs you inflict have (12-20)% increased Slow Magnitude
flavorText:
Drink deeply of the Well.
Let the Abyss coil within.

name: Grip of Winter
explicitMods: Adds (6-8) to 7 Cold damage to Attacks
(20-30)% increased Magnitude of Chill you inflict
flavorText:
After the eruption, the skies turned grey,
ash began to fall, and a chill set in...

name: Guiding Palm of the Eye
explicitMods: Gain (25-25)% of Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Allies in your Presence deal (28-35) to 32 added Attack Cold Damage
(50-50)% of your Base Life Regeneration is granted to Allies in your Presence
Grants effect of Guided Freezing Shrine
flavorText:
"With piercing eyes, you saw through the Stillness.
Undulating as one, you gloriously covered all in white. 
But... I can bear you no longer."
The Dreamer whispered with fogging breath, ice creeping down his hand.

name: Guiding Palm of the Heart
explicitMods: Gain (25-25)% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Allies in your Presence deal (28-35) to 32 added Attack Fire Damage
(50-50)% of your Base Life Regeneration is granted to Allies in your Presence
Grants effect of Guided Meteoric Shrine
flavorText:
"Power of the Red Pyre! Flaming Heart of the Hive!
I release your burning message to rest here, forevermore."
The Dreamer declared, casting out the lingering dark embers within him.

name: Guiding Palm of the Mind
explicitMods: Gain (25-25)% of Damage as Extra Lightning Damage
Allies in your Presence deal (56-70) to 65 added Attack Lightning Damage
(50-50)% of your Base Life Regeneration is granted to Allies in your Presence
Grants effect of Guided Tempest Shrine
flavorText:
"Deep in thought, you would tremble the very air before you.
Wreathed in light, you nurtured them all. 
And yet... Your nature became you."
The Dreamer mused with aching heart, as remnants of forking tendrils burst forth.

name: Hand of Wisdom and Action
explicitMods: Adds (10-10) to 12 Lightning Damage to Attacks per 20 Intelligence
flavorText:
She thinks and we act.
She acts and we think.
Fragments of the whole that washes clean the skies.

name: Hateforge
explicitMods: Gain a random Charge on reaching Maximum Rage, no more than once every (3-6).22 seconds
Lose all Rage on reaching Maximum Rage
flavorText: The first Karui born on the fringes of the Vaal empire developed a blood fever born of corruption.

name: Headhunter
explicitMods: When you kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
flavorText:
"A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Heart of the Well
flavorText:
Countless souls scream in agonising harmony,
forever sinking under the weight of the newly dead.

name: Heartbound Loop
explicitMods: (300-300) Physical Damage taken on Minion Death
flavorText:
When the axe finally fell, Seryl shared his pain,
and the last thought that flickered through his
fading mind was her broken, shattered scream.

name: Heatshiver
explicitMods: Gain 1% of Cold damage as Extra Fire damage per 1% Chill Magnitude on enemy
flavorText:
Give of your heated passions.
Give of your cold resolve.
You will be repaid.

name: Heroic Tragedy
explicitMods:
Remembrancing 6349 songworthy deeds by the line of Olroth
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Kalguur
flavorText:
They believed themselves courageous and selfless,
but that bravery became the doom at their door.

name: Hinekora's Sight
flavorText: Remember the past, anticipate the future.

name: Hoghunt
flavorText:
There was a very clear and delicious
reason why the Ezomytes chose to
stop their flight and settle in Phaaryl.

name: Horns of Bynden
explicitMods: Every Rage also grants 1% increased Armour
flavorText: The younger brother waded into battle, shrugging off blows.

name: Horror's Flight
explicitMods: Adds (31-37) to 32 Chaos Damage to Attacks
Gain 1 Fear Incarnate when you Cull a target
flavorText: If fear doesn't kill you, I will.

name: Hrimnor's Hymn
explicitMods: Slam Skills you use yourself cause an additional Aftershock
flavorText:
"The crack of bone, the spray of blood.
Is there sweeter music?"
- Hrimnor of the Ezomytes.

name: Husk of Dreams
flavorText: Yes... but what if?

name: Hyrri's Ire
explicitMods: Gain (15-25)% of Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Evasion Rating is doubled if you have not been Hit Recently
flavorText:
Hyrri loosed a barrage of arrows,
tipped with a poisoned hatred
only oppression can ferment.

name: Hysseg's Claw
flavorText:
In a time of great need, surrounded by Abyssals,
the Wayward Druid came to the Sun Clan's aid.
It is a debt they have never forgotten.

name: Icefang Orbit
implicitMods: Adds (4-4) to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitMods: Adds (9-13) to 13 Physical Damage to Attacks
All Damage taken from Hits while Poisoned Contributes to Magnitude of Chill on you
All Damage from Hits against Poisoned targets Contributes to Chill Magnitude
(15-25)% increased Magnitude of Poison you inflict
flavorText:
Those members of the Brotherhood who employ the venom of 
Trarthan ice snakes must take great care with the volatile substance.

name: Icetomb
explicitMods: Gain Cold Thorns Damage equal to (10-18)% of your maximum Mana
flavorText:
When Solaris closes her burning eye
At the end of time,
the world will perish in ice.

name: Idle Hands
explicitMods: (25-25)% increased Attack Speed while on Full Mana
You count as on Full Mana while at (90-90)% of maximum Mana or above
flavorText: The devil finds work for idle hands.

name: Idol of Uldurn
flavorText:
Worship of house gods was tolerated
in Oriath, so long as it remained private.

name: Igniferis
explicitMods: Life Recovery from Regeneration is not applied
Every (0.2-0.2) seconds, Recover 1 Life for every 0.2 Life Recovery per second from Regeneration
flavorText:
A hearth unyielding, ever warm,
A light unbroken, endlessly reborn.

name: Immaculate Adherence
explicitMods: (100-100)% of Damage is taken from Mana before Life
Convert 100% of maximum Energy Shield to maximum Divinity
(-20--20)% reduced maximum Divinity per Corrupted Item Equipped
Skills Cost Divinity instead of Mana or Life
flavorText: To stray is to condemn this world to sin.

name: Indigon
explicitMods: (5-10)% increased Cost of Skills for each 200 total Mana Spent Recently
(10-15)% increased Spell damage for each 200 total Mana you have Spent Recently
Mana Recovery other than Regeneration cannot Recover Mana
flavorText:
Where the body's limits begin,
the mind's limits end.

name: Infernoclasp
flavorText: Tempered by the forbidden flame.

name: Ingenuity
explicitMods: (20-30)% increased bonuses gained from left Equipped Ring
(20-30)% increased bonuses gained from right Equipped Ring
flavorText:
Experiments with geomancy taught
the Maji more than they ever expected.

name: Innsmouth
flavorText: Beyond madness lies inspiration.

name: Ironbound
implicitMods: (25-35)% chance to Chain an additional time
explicitMods: (3-5)% increased Block chance per 100 total Item Armour on Equipped Armour Items
Hits with this weapon have (4-5) to 4 Added Physical Damage per 1% Block Chance
Arrows Return if they have Pierced a target which had Fully Broken Armour
flavorText:
Each crest was a Thane's word, bolted to Ivor's bow.
They would join the Count's side, or die by his hands.

name: Irongrasp
flavorText: A power unknown aids your own.

name: Ironride
explicitMods: You have no Accuracy Penalty at Distance
flavorText: Let the rider's aim be true.

name: Jarngreipr
explicitMods: Adds (5-6) to 6 Physical Damage to Attacks
Strength can satisfy other Attribute Requirements of Melee Weapons and Melee Skills
flavorText: The whispers of the old gods hum through the iron. They demand a hero.

name: Kalandra's Touch
flavorText: Power is a matter of perspective.

name: Kaltenhalt
explicitMods: Modifiers to Stun Buildup apply to Freeze Buildup instead for Parry
(100-100)% of Parry Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage
flavorText: Cold, miserable and alone... but alive.

name: Kaom's Heart
flavorText: The warrior who fears will fall.

name: Keelhaul
explicitMods: Life Flasks gain (0.25-0.25).25 charges per Second
Mana Flasks gain (0.25-0.25).25 charges per Second
flavorText:
Below all living things,
there exists a flow...

name: Keeper of the Arc
explicitMods:
Alternating every (-40--40) seconds:
Take 40% less Damage from Hits
Take 40% less Damage over time
flavorText:
The priests of the Kalguur keep faith through numbers
and calculation, not unprovable promises.

name: Killjoy
explicitMods: Life Flasks do not recover Life
flavorText:
"Stitches? Wouldn't that defeat the purpose?" 
- Jeffry, Torturer's Apprentice

name: Kingsguard
explicitMods: Recover (5-5)% of maximum Life for each Endurance Charge consumed
flavorText: The toughest armour is the trust of your people.

name: Kitoko's Current
explicitMods: Lightning damage from Hits Contributes to Electrocution Buildup
flavorText: Reality is a puzzle. Ingenuity is power.

name: Lavianga's Spirits
explicitMods: This Flask cannot be Used but applies its Effect constantly
flavorText:
"How do I cope with what I witnessed on Wraeclast?
Thank the Ancestors! My cup, it overflows."
- Lavianga, former advisor to Kaom

name: Leer Cast
explicitMods: Allies in your Presence deal (50-50)% increased Damage
flavorText: For none of us are as cruel as all of us.

name: Legionstride
explicitMods: (-10--10) Physical damage taken from Projectile Attacks
flavorText: A wall of steel and muscle.

name: Leopold's Applause
explicitMods: Your Hits can Penetrate Elemental Resistances down to a minimum of -50%
flavorText: "Keep smiling. The deepest cut comes not from insults, but from false praise."

name: Levinstone
explicitMods: +1 to Level of all Lightning Skills
flavorText: Highgate held other secrets.

name: Lifesprig
explicitMods: +(1-3) to Level of all Spell Skills
Leeches 1% of maximum Life when you Cast a Spell
flavorText:
From the smallest seeds
To the tallest redwoods,
Life endures in Wraeclast.

name: Lightning Coil
explicitMods: (30-50)% of Physical damage from Hits taken as Lightning damage
flavorText:
The world churned during the Great Wasting.
Tawhoa may have stilled the rioting earth,
but it was Valako that tamed the broken sky.

name: Ligurium Talisman
explicitMods: Life Regeneration is applied to Energy Shield instead
flavorText: Healing the soul requires sacrifice.

name: Liminal Coil
explicitMods: Magnitudes of Curses you inflict are zero
Curses you inflict ignore Curse limit
Spell Hits Gain (23-31)% of Damage as Extra Chaos Damage per Curse on target
Spell Hits Gain (23-31)% of Damage as Extra Physical Damage per Curse on target
flavorText:
In that moment, Viridi's bones became 
branches, weaving over the Darkness. 
She coiled around the nothing, 
trapping it within her everything.

name: Lioneye's Glare
explicitMods: +2 metres to Dodge Roll distance if you haven't Dodge Rolled Recently
(-1--1) metre to Dodge Roll distance if you've Dodge Rolled Recently
Barrageable Attacks with this Bow Repeat +(2-2) times if no enemies are in your Presence
flavorText:
"Kinslayer, you dishonour your own traditions to turn the tide of battle! 
Let us see which is stronger... Karui savagery or the might of the Empire!"
- General Marceus Lioneye

name: Lochtonial Caress
explicitMods: Share Charges with Allies in your Presence
flavorText:
Why cling to your sanity? It offers you nothing.
Surrender to me, and I will grant you everything.

name: Luminous Pace
explicitMods: (100-100)% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
flavorText: Blessed are those who tend the Grove.

name: Lycosidae
explicitMods: Blocking Damage Poisons the Enemy as though dealing (200-200) Base Chaos Damage
flavorText: A true predator does not chase; It waits.

name: Mageblood
explicitMods: All Mage's Legacies have (25-50)% increased effect per duplicate Mage's Legacy you have
flavorText:
Rivers of power coursed through their veins.
Now, that power is yours, for good or ill.

name: Mahuxotl's Machination
explicitMods: (66-333)% increased effect of Socketed Soul Cores
flavorText: The Banished Architect sought to employ the darkest secrets of the Vaal.

name: Maligaro's Virtuosity
explicitMods: Your Critical Hit Chance cannot be Rerolled
flavorText:
Maligaro operated effortlessly,
with great speed and terrible consequences.

name: Marohi Erqi
explicitMods: Heavy Stuns Enemies that are on Full Life
flavorText:
"Drunken Erqi boasted to Tukohama; the God of War
challenged him to a clash of strength. Woe to the
Divine - he should have made it a test of skill!"

name: Mask of the Sanguimancer
explicitMods: (20-40)% increased Critical Hit Chance for Spells
flavorText:
A terror of ancient times, his identity
remains lost... but his power does not.

name: Mask of the Stitched Demon
explicitMods: Regenerate (0.05-0.05).05 Life per second per Maximum Energy Shield
flavorText:
From the flesh of the gods, Xibaqua was born.
From the carnage of Xibaqua, we were born.
It is our duty to return to the gods what was once theirs.

name: Mastered Domain
implicitMods:
Adds Irradiated to a Map 
(10-10) use remaining
explicitMods: Map also counts as a Desert Map
flavorText:
For a brief shining time, the Precursors
could resculpt the world as they saw fit.

name: Matsya
flavorText: In our tales, and in our hearts, the rivers still flow.

name: Megalomaniac
flavorText:
If you're going to act like you're better
than everyone else, make sure you are.

name: Meginord's Girdle
flavorText:
Kaom's strength was rivaled only by
the great Meginord of the north.

name: Melting Maelstrom
explicitMods: Effect is not removed when Unreserved Mana is Filled
Every (100-100) seconds during Effect, deal 100% of Mana spent in those seconds as Chaos Damage to Enemies within 3 metres
Deals (25-25)% of current Mana as Chaos Damage to you when Effect ends
flavorText: What is life, but a dreamlike spiral of panic?

name: Merit of Service
explicitMods: Allies in your Presence have Block Chance equal to yours
flavorText: Lead by example, and you shall never be alone.

name: Midnight Braid
explicitMods: (50-50)% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana
flavorText:
Adversity is the soil in
which persistence grows.

name: Mind of the Council
explicitMods: Attacks cost an additional (6-6)% of your maximum Mana
Attacks have Added maximum Lightning Damage equal to (6-9)% of maximum Mana
flavorText:
The sky tore asunder, black cleaving upon blue
The end of life, of Time, with no escape
But they found a fragment, a void, a haven
And there they waited, as it all began again
Dark will, dark knowledge, enemies of Fate
They know your mind, because they remember

name: Ming's Heart
explicitMods: Gain (30-40)% of Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
flavorText:
Ming slew Tranquillity
Took Chaos for his wife
And on Her immortal finger
He placed his Heart

name: Mist Whisper
flavorText:
Sibilant promises surrounded them in the night.
All the travelers had to give him was their devotion...

name: Mjölner
explicitMods: +(2-4) to Level of all Lightning Skills
flavorText: Look the storm in the eye and you will have its respect.

name: Morior Invictus
explicitMods: (300-400)% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield
+(10-13)% to Chaos Resistance per Socket filled
+(45-60) to maximum Life per Socket filled
+(50-60) to maximum Mana per Socket filled
flavorText:
The Unblinking Eye did not cower and wail.
They stood against the end.

name: Murkshaft
implicitMods: (20-30)% chance to Poison on Hit with Attacks
explicitMods: Adds (13-17) to 17 Physical Damage to Attacks
(20-30)% chance to Poison on Hit with Attacks
Blind Targets when you Poison them
flavorText:
"Boiling frogs isn't for spells, dear. That's a disgusting
rumour. They're actually for brewing poisons."
- Selassie of the Black Fen

name: Myris Uxor
flavorText: The end always comes sooner than we think.

name: Nascent Hope
explicitMods: (20-25)% Chance to gain a Charge when you kill an enemy
Energy Shield Recharge starts on use
flavorText:
"Even in the face of the Winter of the World,
life found a way. The Spirit always provides."

name: Nazir's Judgement
explicitMods: (35-50)% increased Melee Damage against Heavy Stunned enemies
flavorText:
The first witch hunter knew one critical tactic:
never let your enemy have a clear moment.

name: Nebuloch
explicitMods: Attacks consume an Endurance Charge to Critically Hit
Take (100-100) Chaos damage per second per Endurance Charge
flavorText:
They hoped that, trapped in its prison,
the creature would age and perish.
But time would not touch the fiend.

name: Necromantle
explicitMods: Minions gain (20-30)% of their maximum Life as Extra maximum Energy Shield
flavorText:
Fueled by the blackness in the hearts of men,
the armies of Saresh were just as relentless.

name: Ngamahu's Chosen
implicitMods: Used when you take Fire damage from a Hit
explicitMods: Grants up to your maximum Rage on use
flavorText: Kaom was not known for his restraint.

name: Nightfall
explicitMods: (10-20)% of Fire damage taken as Cold damage
(10-20)% of Lightning damage taken as Cold damage
flavorText:
"Upon plains of endless chill,
They Who Never Tire... dominate.
They Who Never Surrender... terrify.
 And They Who Lay Beneath... wait for Nightfall."
- Tul, She That Silences

name: Nightscale
explicitMods: (150-150)% increased Mana Regeneration Rate if you've dealt a Critical Hit Recently
Cannot Regenerate Mana if you haven't dealt a Critical Hit Recently
flavorText: Diamora sings not for hunger, but for longing.

name: Nocturne
explicitMods: Parried enemies take more Spell Damage instead of more Attack Damage
flavorText:
Light and shadow chase eternal,
but neither knows the other exists...

name: Northpaw
explicitMods: Adds (8-10) to 10 Physical Damage to Attacks
Base Critical Hit Chance for Attacks with Weapons is (7-7)%
flavorText: Fight with the ferocity of the First Ones.

name: Oaksworn
flavorText: The druids swore to protect the Grelwood with their very lives.

name: Obern's Bastion
flavorText: The storm cannot sway those of sure footing.

name: Olroth's Resolve
explicitMods: Excess Life Recovery added as Guard for (20-20) seconds
flavorText:
Olroth the Gallant,
tireless and true,
he fights for me,
he fights for you!

name: Olrovasara
explicitMods:
On Hitting an enemy, gains maximum added Lightning damage equal to
the enemy's Power for (500-500) seconds, up to a total of 500
flavorText:
"True heroes grow stronger in the face of adversity."
- Fourth Tenet of the Knights of the Sun

name: Opportunity
explicitMods: Effect is not removed when Unreserved Life is Filled
Used when you release a skill with Perfect Timing
Skills have (80-120)% longer Perfect Timing window during effect
flavorText:
"Calculations complete, and He is assembled.
Our immaculate tactics are set in motion."

name: Original Sin
explicitMods: (100-100)% of Elemental Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
flavorText:
Innocence rose to godhood not on inspired faith,
but on the vilification and hatred of another.

name: Painter's Servant
explicitMods: Gain (5-10)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Cold Damage
Gain (5-10)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Gain (5-10)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Lightning Damage
(33-33)% of Elemental Damage Converted to Cold Damage
(33-33)% of Elemental Damage Converted to Fire Damage
(33-33)% of Elemental Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
flavorText:
Bloodshed on the crimson shores,
longing for the endless sea.
Treasures, life, I'd give it all
just to capture thee.

name: Palm of the Dreamer
explicitMods: Allies in your Presence deal (25-37) to 28 added Attack Chaos Damage
Gain (27-27)% of Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
Grants effect of Dreaming Gloom Shrine
flavorText:
"We sometimes fail. We sometimes succeed. Who determines one from the other?
I now know we can never be made One, if we are bore of differing desires.
And yet, I have hope for a new truth. And I will see it... made real."
- The Benevolent Dreamer

name: Pariah's Embrace
flavorText:
His isolation caused him to treasure
their companionship all the more.

name: Perandus Seal
explicitMods: (10-15)% increased Quantity of Gold Dropped by Slain Enemies
flavorText: A pact with Prospero always comes at a price.

name: Perfidy
explicitMods: (10-30)% chance to Avoid Physical Damage from Hits
(10-30)% chance to Avoid Fire Damage from Hits
(10-30)% chance to Avoid Cold Damage from Hits
(10-30)% chance to Avoid Lightning Damage from Hits
(10-30)% chance to Avoid Chaos Damage from Hits
Enemies in your Presence are Intimidated
flavorText:
The Trickster God turned the very Day and Night against each other.
What hope have you?

name: Periphery
explicitMods: Elemental Damage from Hits Contributes to Flammability, Ignite, and Chill Magnitudes, Freeze Buildup, and Shock Chance
flavorText:
As the Maji approached the edge of Nothingness, she strung 
fragments of the Wildwood's carcass together. When she 
nocked her arrow, she pulled upon the elements of life itself.

name: Pillar of the Caged God
implicitMods: (16-16)% increased Melee Strike Range with this weapon
explicitMods: 1% increased Area of Effect for Attacks per 10 Intelligence
flavorText:
Forged to rule the waves and tide
Destined to serve the monkey's paw
Strong as a tower of iron
Deft as the needle doubt

name: Plaguefinger
explicitMods: All Damage from Hits Contributes to Poison Magnitude
flavorText: Ulcers, scabs, and pocks, the third army makes its claim.

name: Polcirkeln
explicitMods: Enemies Chilled by your Hits can be Shattered as though Frozen
flavorText:
I rule the north
A legacy earned
Time and time again
Sing Meginord's song!

name: Powertread
explicitMods: (12-12)% increased Critical Damage Bonus per Power Charge
flavorText:
The combat stance used by Vaal nobles
was as elegant as it was deadly.

name: Pragmatism
flavorText:
In an endless war against darkness,
one must be ever vigilant.

name: Prayers for Rain
explicitMods: (-30--30)% slower start of Energy Shield Recharge
Energy Shield Recharge is not interrupted by Damage if Recharge began Recently
flavorText:
In its final era, the roofs of Keth were rife with
anything and everything that could hold water...
should the opportunity arise.

name: Prism Guardian
explicitMods: 1% increased Spirit Reservation Efficiency of Buff Skills per 100 Maximum Life
flavorText: When blood is paid, the weak think twice.

name: Prism of Belief
explicitMods: +(1-3) to Level of all Magma Barrier Skills
flavorText: Entropy can be reversed.

name: Prized Pain
implicitMods: Adds (4-4) to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitMods: Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to (10-10)% of Base Mana Cost
Deal your Thorns Damage to Enemies you Stun with Melee Attacks
flavorText: Agony brings clarity to those of pure mind.

name: Quatl's Molt
explicitMods: Gain Deflection Rating equal to (40-60)% of Evasion Rating
flavorText: As the serpent wills.

name: Quecholli
implicitMods: Causes Enemies to Explode on Critical kill, for (10-10)% of their Life as Physical Damage
explicitMods: This Weapon's Critical Hit Chance is (100-100)%
Critical Hits do not deal extra Damage
flavorText:
"The finest prosperity grows from the direst
carnage. Such is the nature of progress."
- Doryani of the Vaal

name: Queen of the Forest
explicitMods:
Increases Movement Speed by (600-600)%, plus 1% per 600 Evasion Rating, up to a maximum of 75%
Other Modifiers to Movement Speed except for Sprinting do not apply
flavorText:
Shedding away her regal past,
she forged a new destiny.
Sacrificing the ephemeral joys of man,
she embraced the eternal grasp of nature.
Seizing her one true wish,
she found peace at last.

name: Quill Rain
flavorText:
"The rain of a thousand quills that whittle
present into past, life into death."
- Rigwald of the Ezomytes

name: Radiant Grief
explicitMods: Enemies in your Presence are Ignited as though dealt (100-100) Base Fire Damage
flavorText: No man burns alone.

name: Rampart Raptor
explicitMods:
Bolts fired by Crossbow Attacks have (100-100)% chance to not
expend Ammunition if you've Reloaded Recently
flavorText:
"His approach to the gate was met with sounding trumpets
and an unfurling of banners. He never saw it coming."
- anonymous Brotherhood of Silence report

name: Rathpith Globe
explicitMods: Non-Channelling Spells cost an additional (6-6)% of your maximum Life
Non-Channelling Spells have (3-3)% increased Critical Hit Chance per 100 maximum Life
Non-Channelling Spells deal (6-6)% increased Damage per 100 maximum Life
flavorText:
The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.

name: Rearguard
explicitMods: Adds (14-20) to 19 Physical Damage to Attacks
flavorText:
"It's a rare man that has eyes in the back of his head."
- Kiravi, Vaal Archer

name: Redblade Banner
explicitMods: Enemies in your Presence count as having double Power
flavorText: Blood shed is blood shared.

name: Redemption
explicitMods: Hits with this Weapon have no Critical Damage Bonus

Gain (2-3) Explosive Rhythm every 3 times you use a Grenade Skill
 Remove all Explosive Rhythm on reaching 10 to gain Explosive Fervour for 10 Seconds
flavorText:
"The time has passed for diplomacy!
If they will not respect House Azadi, 
then let them die gloriously... and loudly.
We are the masters of the Death Trades!"
- Ratha Azadi

name: Redflare Conduit
explicitMods: (20-20)% chance to gain a Power Charge on Hit
Lose all Power Charges on reaching maximum Power Charges
Shocks you when you reach maximum Power Charges
flavorText: In all things, control.

name: Revered Resin
explicitMods: Life Flasks gain (0.17-0.25).18 charges per Second
flavorText: The sacred sap flows slowly, but surely.

name: Reverie
explicitMods:
Cannot use Life Flasks
Non-Unique Life Flasks apply their Effects constantly
Recovery from Life Flasks cannot be Instant
Recovery from your Life Flasks cannot be applied to anything other than you
flavorText:
"Do not despair! Give yourself to the woods!
Become empty, and the Goddess will find you.
From within her roots... you shall be restored."
- Cirel of Caer Tarth

name: Rise of the Phoenix
explicitMods: +(25-25)% to Fire Resistance while on Low Life
Regenerate (3-3)% of maximum Life per second
Regenerate (3-3)% of maximum Life per second while on Low Life
flavorText:
My bearer shall be guarded by flame,
for I am the phoenix, forever radiant in glory.

name: Rite of Passage
implicitMods: Used when you kill a Rare or Unique enemy
explicitMods: Possessed by Spirit Of The Serpent for (10-20) seconds on use
flavorText:
To become a warrior and a hunter, each young
Azmeri must prove themselves before the Spirit.

name: Rondel de Ezo
explicitMods: Curse Enemies with Enfeeble on Block
flavorText:
"Resist for long enough, and your oppressor
will lose his will. Then, you've won."

name: Rondel of Fragility
flavorText:
Fanatics are the most dangerous enemy,
for they care not for their own survival.

name: Ryslatha's Coil
flavorText: All creatures have the potential for greatness or unequivocal failure.

name: Sacred Flame
explicitMods: Gain (40-60)% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Allies in your Presence Regenerate (2-3).1% of their Maximum Life per second
Allies in your Presence Gain (20-30)% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Enemies in your Presence Resist Elemental Damage based on their Lowest Resistance
flavorText:
Fire destroys, but fire also purifies.
Life always springs anew.

name: Sacrosanctum
explicitMods: (10-20)% of Damage taken Recouped as Life
Damage taken Recouped as Life is also Recouped as Energy Shield
flavorText:
The Twilight Order rejected the gods, choosing
instead to put their faith in each other.

name: Sadist's Mercy
explicitMods: Hits with this Weapon inflict (2-5) Gruelling Madness
Enemies in your Presence have additional Power equal to their Gruelling Madness
flavorText:
"You mortals are insidious. You repress your
evil, or deny it exists. Liars! When I open
your heads, that violence floods out."
- The Raven Trickster

name: Saffell's Frame
explicitMods: Modifiers to Maximum Block Chance instead apply to Maximum Resistances
flavorText: A swift mind solves problems before they occur.

name: Safrin's Resolve
explicitMods: You can only Socket Ruby Jewels in this item
+(5-10)% to Cold and Lightning Resistances per Equipped Item with a Fire Resistance Modifier
flavorText:
The Vaal protected those who integrated into their 
culture. Many neighbours became one. Sekhema Safrin 
vowed the Maraketh identity would remain resolute.

name: Saitha's Spear
implicitMods: Bleeding you inflict deals Damage (10-20)% faster
explicitMods: (15-25)% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
Aggravating any Bleeding with this Weapon also Aggravates all Ignites on the target
(25-40)% chance to Aggravate Bleeding on Hit
flavorText:
Born in a star of man's own make,
fused to her hand by her last mistake.

name: Sands of Silk
flavorText: The desert is ever flowing.

name: Sandstorm Visage
explicitMods: Enemies in your Presence are Blinded
Every second, inflicts Critical Weakness on enemies in your Presence for (15-20) seconds
flavorText: A fell wind brings death.

name: Sanguine Diviner
explicitMods: (25-25)% chance to inflict Bleeding on Hit
(25-25)% of Spell Mana Cost Converted to Life Cost
flavorText: One way or another, it will find what it seeks.

name: Sanguis Heroum
flavorText:
Wraeclast has known too few true heroes.
It remembers those that stood in defiance.

name: Scold's Bridle
explicitMods: Take (25-100)% of Mana Costs you pay for Skills as Physical Damage
flavorText:
"The sharper the pain, the sharper the mind.
A curious paradox."
- Shavronne of Umbra

name: Sculpted Suffering
explicitMods: Breaks Armour equal to (40-40)% of damage from Hits with this weapon
Fully Armour Broken enemies you kill with Hits Shatter
flavorText:
The Abyssals were created, not born,
and every moment in the light was agony.

name: Season of the Hunt
implicitMods:
Empowers the Map Boss of a Map 
(5-5) uses remaining
explicitMods: Map Bosses are Hunted by Azmeri Spirits
flavorText:
Darkness and light, naught but forest between.
As the forest fades, the twilight hunt begins.

name: Seed of Cataclysm
explicitMods: (30-50)% increased Critical Hit Chance for Spells
flavorText: The dawn of a new era is set into motion

name: Seeing Stars
flavorText: Within lies a window.

name: Sekhema's Resolve
explicitMods: Cold Resistance is unaffected by Area Penalties
You can only Socket Sapphire Jewels in this item
flavorText:
Though the Winter of the World shrouded the
Vastiri in ice, we remained, unchanged.

name: Serle's Grit
explicitMods: Skills which Empower an Attack have (10-20)% chance to not count that Attack
(80-100) to 89 added Physical Thorns damage per Runic Plate
flavorText:
A common soldier from a common family kept hammering into the night
after each grueling march, his eyes afire with starlight and determination.
Few suspected that he would one day become the greatest among them.

name: Serpent's Egg
explicitMods: Gain an additional Charge when you gain a Charge
flavorText:
When Kabala the Serpent Queen was banished from Keth,
the Sekhemas took a single hostage as punishment.

name: Serpent's Lesson
explicitMods: You count as on Low Life while at (35-35)% of maximum Mana or below
You count as on Low Mana while at (35-35)% of maximum Life or below
flavorText: Sinuous, entwined... inextricable.

name: Shackles of the Wretched
explicitMods: You cannot be Chilled for (6-6) seconds after being Chilled
You cannot be Frozen for (6-6) seconds after being Frozen
You cannot be Ignited for (6-6) seconds after being Ignited
You cannot be Shocked for (6-6) seconds after being Shocked
Curses you inflict are reflected back to you
flavorText: Captivity breeds creativity.

name: Shankgonne
explicitMods: Gain Deflection Rating equal to (20-20)% of Armour
flavorText:
"Captain Hiff Greybeard accomplished what nary a Brinerot
could: he died of old age. Almost had him a dozen times
meself, if it weren't for that damn leg of his... crafty shite..."

name: Shavronne's Satchel
explicitMods: Life Recovery from Flasks also applies to Energy Shield
flavorText: Bring mystery to life. Again and again.

name: Shyaba
flavorText: Be not deceived by the treachery of men.

name: Sierran Inheritance
explicitMods: (30-50)% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
All Damage taken from Hits Contributes to Magnitude of Chill inflicted on you
The Effect of Chill on you is reversed
flavorText:
Born among the high peaks, many Mutewind
live their entire lives in snow and ice.

name: Silks of Veneration
explicitMods: Current Energy Shield also grants Elemental Damage reduction
flavorText:
Hallowed Dordalus was cast into the pit as a heretic,
but his piety was so great, he would not burn.
He rose again, lauded, his faith forever changed...
but not the way the Templar believed.

name: Silverthorne
explicitMods: Parrying applies (10-10) Stacks of Critical Weakness
flavorText:
As a boy, in the arena, Daresso learned to
feign weakness to open up a lethal blow.

name: Sine Aequo
explicitMods: (100-150)% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield
Immobilise enemies at (50-50)% buildup instead of 100%
Enemies Immobilised by you take (-20--20)% more Damage
flavorText: The greatest warrior of his era fought with honour.

name: Sire of Shards
explicitMods:
Spells fire (4-4) additional Projectiles
Spells fire Projectiles in a circle
flavorText: That which was broken may yet break.

name: Skin of the Loyal
explicitMods: Elemental Ailment Threshold is increased by Uncapped Chaos Resistance
Armour is increased by Uncapped Fire Resistance
Energy Shield is increased by Uncapped Cold Resistance
Evasion Rating is increased by Uncapped Lightning Resistance
flavorText:
We happily give our limbs.
A net woven to keep safe the bones of the Lords.

name: Skysliver
explicitMods: Rolls only the minimum or maximum Damage value for each Damage Type
flavorText: Heads fall to the sand, just as the star fell from the sky

name: Slivertongue
explicitMods: Leeches (5-8).07% of Physical Damage as Life
Leeches (4-7).04% of Physical Damage as Mana
Arrows Pierce all targets after Forking
flavorText: A hundred blind heads, each seeking the taste of prey on the air.

name: Snakebite
explicitMods: Targets can be affected by +1 of your Poisons at the same time
flavorText:
As the serpent shuns thought,
It shuns fear.
It strikes with the speed of wrath
And the skill of compulsion.

name: Snakepit
explicitMods: Left ring slot: Projectiles from Spells cannot Chain
Left ring slot: Projectiles from Spells Fork
Right ring slot: Projectiles from Spells Chain +1 times
Right ring slot: Projectiles from Spells cannot Fork
flavorText: They wrap around you until your blood turns as cold as theirs.

name: Solus Ipse
explicitMods: (150-200)% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield
Equipment and Skill Gems have (25-25)% increased Attribute Requirements
You can Socket (2-2) additional copies of each Lineage Support Gem, in different Skills
flavorText: One warrior alone survived to face the Arbiter.

name: Soul Mantle
explicitMods: +1 to maximum number of Summoned Totems
Inflicts a random Curse on you when your Totems die, ignoring Curse limit
flavorText:
The greatest mistakes cause suffering
long after they have been made

name: Soul Tether
explicitMods: You lose (5-5)% of maximum Energy Shield per second
Excess Life Recovery from Leech is applied to Energy Shield
flavorText:
Vaal bloodpriests were among the earliest intellectuals on record.
It was they who found that a newly freed soul would
desperately cling to any other source of life.

name: Spire of Ire
explicitMods: Leeches (10-20).17% of Physical Damage as Life
When you Consume a Charge Trigger Chaotic Surge to gain (2-2) Chaos Surges
Life Leech recovers based on your Chaos damage instead of Physical damage
flavorText:
The spear was specially forged to assassinate Voll,
but Maligaro never got a chance to use it...

name: Spiteful Floret
explicitMods: (20-30)% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
Every (5-5) Rage also grants 5% of Damage taken Recouped as Life
flavorText:
If you see the blushing tree of the northern woods,
remember: "Blossoms of red, the tree's been fed.
Blossoms of white, prepare for a fight."

name: Splinter of Loratta
explicitMods: (20-20)% increased Melee Strike Range with this weapon
Any number of Poisons from this Weapon can affect a target at the same time
(100-100)% chance to Poison on Hit with this weapon
flavorText: The Baleful Gem's corruption lingers still...

name: Splinter of Lorrata
explicitMods: (20-20)% increased Melee Strike Range with this weapon
Any number of Poisons from this Weapon can affect a target at the same time
Always Poison on Hit with this weapon
flavorText: The Baleful Gem's corruption lingers still...

name: Splinterheart
flavorText:
The forests of the Vastiri held many secrets
mystical and dark. Men learned not to wander,
lest they return with a strange new purpose.

name: Split Personality
explicitMods: Can Allocate Passive Skills from the Ranger's starting point
flavorText:
"Try on another life. See how it fits. You'll
find that your one life is utterly inadequate."
- He of Many Names and Many Faces

name: Starkonja's Head
explicitMods: (150-150)% increased Global Evasion Rating when on Low Life
(15-15)% of Damage from Hits is taken from your Damageable Companion's Life before you
flavorText:
There was no hero made out of Starkonja's death,
but merely a long sleep made eternal.

name: Stone of Lazhwar
explicitMods: +(15-25)% to Block Chance while holding a Focus
flavorText:
You are slow, foolish and ignorant.
I am not.

name: Strugglescream
flavorText:
There is no light at the end of this inner strife,
but the shadows eventually become home.

name: Sunsplinter
explicitMods: +3 to Level of all Cold Skills
+2 to Level of all Fire Skills
+1 to Level of all Lightning Skills
flavorText:
"Lundara held back the hordes, while Solerai rose to split the sky.
With a single stroke, she ended the Winter of the World."
- Wranga, tale-woman of the Wahida akhara

name: Surefooted Sigil
explicitMods: (50-50)% increased Evasion Rating if you've Dodge Rolled Recently
flavorText: Natural grace is born, not earned.

name: Surge of the Tide
explicitMods:
Every second Slam Skill you use while Shapeshifted is Ancestrally Boosted
Every second Strike Skill you use while Shapeshifted is Ancestrally Boosted
flavorText:
"A traditional hatungo does not carry an axe,
it is true. But as Narumoa showed us, there
are many ways to crush one's enemy..."

name: Svalinn
explicitMods: Chance to Block Damage is Lucky
flavorText:
The priests found the Great Shield the night it fell to Middengard,
but it was the smiths who delved into the secrets it held.

name: Sylvan's Effigy
explicitMods: Allies in your Presence Regenerate (50-100).8 Life per second
Companions deal (50-100)% increased damage to your Marked targets
You can have any number of Companions of different types
flavorText:
Darkness howls through ancient bones, a wistful cry
on hollow winds. The moon listens. The pack gathers.

name: Tangletongue
explicitMods: (10-10)% of Skill Mana Costs Converted to Life Costs
flavorText:
"In the hands of Orbala, it made a god bleed."
- Wranga, tale-woman of the Wahida akhara

name: Taryn's Shiver
explicitMods: Enemies Frozen by you take (100-100)% increased Damage
flavorText:
Shed by the winged beast of night,
A scaly frost-encrusted thorn.
All who feel its wintry light
Shiver in pain at the frozen dawn.

name: Temporalis
explicitMods: (5-30)% of Damage taken Recouped as Life
(5-30)% of Damage taken Recouped as Mana
flavorText:
The final element the tale-women
mastered was Time itself.

name: Tetzlapokal's Desire
flavorText: A faith born of flesh.

name: The Adorned
explicitMods:
(0-150)% increased Effect of Jewel Socket Passive Skills
containing Corrupted Magic Jewels
flavorText:
At their height, the Vaal glittered under the sun.
A decade, a century, an aeon of prosperity...
now nothing more than a passing wonder.

name: The Anvil
flavorText: Forge your Perseverance on the Anvil of Faith.

name: The Auspex
explicitMods: Chance to Deflect is Lucky while on Low Life
Enemies in your Presence gain 1 Gruelling Madness each second
flavorText:
"The boy is a bad omen," he cried. "Ravens gather
before him!" That night, a new raven appeared, and
shadowed the Auspex for the rest of his days.

name: The Barrow Dweller
explicitMods: Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky while you are on Low Life
(50-50)% chance to Avoid Death from Hits
flavorText:
In the mists they dwell,
forever hungry,
forever cold.

name: The Black Cat
explicitMods: Lightning Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky during effect
flavorText:
The most beloved member of every Brinerot crew
is the one that refuses to do any actual work.

name: The Black Doubt
explicitMods:
Damage over Time bypasses your Energy Shield
While not on Full Life, Sacrifice (10-10)% of maximum Mana per Second to Recover that much Life
flavorText: Suspicion is a sinister shadow slithering in the soul.

name: The Black Insignia
explicitMods: Gain Tailwind on Critical Hit, no more than once per second
flavorText:
Brinerot pirates live in a perpetual blaze of glory,
pushing their luck right to the end.

name: The Blood Thorn
flavorText: Touch not the thorn, for only blood and pain await.

name: The Brass Dome
explicitMods: Take no Extra Damage from Critical Hits
flavorText: The turtle's shell one day becomes its tomb.

name: The Bringer of Rain
explicitMods: You can wield Two-Handed Axes, Maces and Swords in one hand
This item gains bonuses from Socketed Items as though it was a Body Armour
flavorText:
"What lies beneath your feet?!"
"Sacred ground, watered with tears of blood!"

name: The Burden of Leadership
explicitMods: Zarokh, the Temporal drops Sekhema's Resolve
Rooms are unknown on the Trial Map
This item is destroyed when applied to a Trial
flavorText:
The path forward is unknown,
but someone must lead.
Let it be the best of us.

name: The Burden of Shadows
explicitMods: Skill Mana Costs Converted to Life Costs
Skills gain 1% of Damage as Chaos Damage per 3 Life Cost
flavorText:
Nothingness is loathe to relinquish its grip.
Every moment is a struggle to exist.

name: The Burrower
explicitMods: Lightning Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky
flavorText:
It coils deeper and deeper
It slithers between thoughts
It lies beneath the valley
It lies in our minds

name: The Changing Seasons
explicitMods: Zarokh, the Temporal drops Sandstorm Visage
This item is destroyed when applied to a Trial
flavorText:
All rejoiced when Solerai and Lundara shattered the grey sky,
but with the cold banished, sandier climes began to creep in...

name: The Coming Calamity
explicitMods: Enemies in your Presence have no Elemental Resistances
flavorText:
Whiff of cold, tiny spark, faintest flicker in the dark.
Embers swirl, ice takes form, sky exposed - Death's perfect storm.
Frost and thunder, flames shine bright, ruin walks the land tonight.
By your hand they dance and bend, wield them and brook no end.

name: The Covenant
explicitMods: Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to (100-100)% of Base Mana Cost
flavorText:
My Soul is your Strength
My Price is your Blood

name: The Dancing Mirage
explicitMods: (20-20)% less Damage taken if you have not been Hit Recently
(100-100)% increased Evasion Rating if you have been Hit Recently
flavorText: Be not where death falls.

name: The Dark Defiler
explicitMods: Gain (5-5)% of Damage as Chaos Damage per Undead Minion
flavorText:
Rare is the Necromancer who leads
his undead armies from the front.

name: The Deepest Tower
explicitMods: Enemies in your Presence count as being on Low Life
flavorText: Death crawls in darkness, closer than we think.

name: The Desperate Alliance
