explicitMods: Zarokh, the Temporal drops Against the Darkness
Zarokh, the Temporal deals (100-100)% more Damage
Zarokh, the Temporal takes (-75--75)% less Damage
This item is destroyed when applied to a Trial
flavorText:
By fire and ice, perhaps the end of the world.
They did not fall on their knees and lament.

name: The Devouring Diadem
explicitMods: Every (20-20) seconds, Consume a nearby Corpse to Recover 20% of maximum Life
flavorText: The spirit hungers for the flesh.

name: The Empty Roar
explicitMods: Leeches (10-10)% of Physical Damage as Life
(10-20)% chance to cause Bleeding on Hit
All Attacks count as Empowered Attacks
flavorText: Secrecy and silence are powers all their own.

name: The Eternal Spark
explicitMods: (40-40)% increased Mana Regeneration Rate while stationary
flavorText:
A flash of blue, a stormcloud's kiss,
her motionless dance the pulse of bliss

name: The Everlasting Gaze
explicitMods: Gain (4-6)% of maximum Mana as Extra maximum Energy Shield
flavorText:
What they saw was what they believed, and
they believed Lunaris had not abandoned them.

name: The Fall of the Axe
implicitMods: Used when you are affected by a Slow
flavorText:
"When the headsman's blade swings,
your last moments stretch to eternity."
- Vorm, the Twice-Pardoned

name: The Fallen Formation
flavorText:
"I will never forget. I will carry your memory
forward, all of you, from this ghastly Vale."
- Artair, last survivor of the Ogham rebellion

name: The Flesh Poppet
explicitMods:
Copy a random Modifier from each enemy in your Presence when
you Shapeshift to an Animal form
Modifiers gained this way are lost after (30-30) seconds or when you next Shapeshift
flavorText:
Long ago, the witches of the Azak Tribe learned
how to tap into the flow of Vivid lifeforce to
'cooperate' with their enemies... forcefully.

name: The Gnashing Sash
explicitMods: Lose (5-5)% of maximum Life per second
Life Recovery from Flasks can Overflow Maximum Life
flavorText:
"Ghorr knows only hunger, only ravenous feasting.
It will consume all that lives, and more!"
- Rantings of a Templar prisoner, page fourteen

name: The Grand Project
implicitMods:
Adds Irradiated to a Map 
(1-1) use remaining
explicitMods:
Can only be applied to Precursor Tower Maps
Completing the Tower makes all nearby Maps accessible
flavorText:
"I see a pattern in these towers. Whoever the Precursors were, they sought to master
this world, to shape it as they saw fit. My people had the same ambition..."

name: The Hammer of Faith
explicitMods: Every 10 seconds, gain a random non-damaging Shrine buff for 20 seconds
flavorText:
The secret Order endured by publicly
praying however the Templars demanded.
One day, justice would fall upon them...

name: The Hollow Mask
flavorText: The roots take hold within...

name: The Infinite Pursuit
explicitMods: (80-100)% increased Chance to be afflicted by Ailments when Hit
(25-25)% increased Movement Speed while affected by an Ailment
flavorText: We move to be closer to her, but the distance yet grows.

name: The Knight-errant
flavorText: Some search forever for their path.

name: The Last Flame
explicitMods: Cannot be used with Trials below level (80-80)
This item is destroyed when applied to a Trial
flavorText: In the coldest depths of the Winter of the World, overrun by darkness and fighting to the last, life itself clung to existence by the barest remaining thread.

name: The Last Lament
explicitMods: Leeches (5-10).81% of Physical Damage as Life
(10-20)% chance to load a bolt into all Crossbow skills on Kill
Sacrifice (300-300) Life to not consume the last bolt when firing
flavorText:
"And here we shall remain... 
trapped in our symphony of eternal anguish.
Artist and Composer, their fates entwined for all of time."
- Adamantia Brektov, the Composer

name: The Lethal Draw
implicitMods: Gain (2-3) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
explicitMods: Gain (5-5) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
Bow Attacks consume (5-10)% of your maximum Life Flask Charges if possible to deal added Physical damage equal to 10% of Flask's Life Recovery amount
flavorText: Life and death ooze from the same sap.

name: The Mutable Star
explicitMods: Defend against Hits as though you had 1% more Armour per 1% current Energy Shield
(-50--30)% reduced Duration of Bleeding on You
flavorText:
Through every great purge, and every fiery inquisition,
the Twilight Order endured in secret.

name: The Ordained
implicitMods: (25-25)% increased Melee Strike Range with this weapon
explicitMods: Life Leech recovers based on your Lightning damage as well as Physical damage
Create a Fragment of Divinity in your Presence every 4 seconds
flavorText: May the Lightless drown in the violence of His devotion.

name: The Pandemonius
flavorText:
A single moment sets in motion an eternal fall,
beneath which all are buried.

name: The Peacemaker's Draught
explicitMods: Zarokh, the Temporal drops an additional Barya
This item is destroyed when applied to a Trial
flavorText:
Centuries of peace brought immense wealth to Keth,
but many worried that it had also left the people soft.

name: The Prisoner's Manacles
explicitMods: Debuffs you inflict have (20-30)% increased Slow Magnitude
flavorText:
Only once did Maligaro wonder if he'd gone too far.
His greatest success took three entire legions to capture.

name: The Rat Cage
explicitMods: (100-100)% of Fire Damage from Hits taken as Physical Damage
flavorText:
The truth lies inside every man, if you dig around. 
Many a confession was found in the bowels of Axiom.

name: The Raven's Flock
explicitMods: Minions have (10-20)% chance to inflict Gruelling Madness on Hit
(30-50)% increased Spirit Reservation Efficiency of Skills
flavorText:
"Where the boy went, ravens gathered,
feasting on misery. His vile influence
spread, swift as the carnage they wrought."

name: The Remembered Tales
explicitMods: Zarokh, the Temporal drops Blessed Bonds
This item is destroyed when applied to a Trial
flavorText:
As they looked toward the future, yet held close the past,
the tale-women began to see the tapestry of Time.

name: The Road Warrior
explicitMods: Moving while Bleeding doesn't cause you to take extra damage
flavorText:
That most legendary caravan bandit had
one rule: never let them see you flinch.

name: The Searing Touch
explicitMods: Ignites you inflict spread to other Enemies that stay within 1.5 metres for 1 second
flavorText:
Burn to cinders, scar and maim,
Rule a world, bathed in flame.

name: The Sentry
flavorText:
The night Draven attacked,
Erian was asleep at his post.

name: The Smiling Knight
explicitMods: Aggravate Bleeding on targets you Critically Hit with Attacks
flavorText:
He never spoke a word. His opponents imagined
their own personal mockeries, most cruel.

name: The Sunken Vessel
explicitMods: Physical Damage of Enemies Hitting you is Unlucky
Convert All Armour to Evasion Rating
flavorText:
"What are you lot looking at? We're
under fire! Get to your stations!"
- Captain Sventura, the Unlucky

name: The Surrender
explicitMods: Recover (4-4)% of maximum Life when you Block
flavorText:
Our hearts cry out
but are silenced by our flesh
and so we give up our flesh.

name: The Three Dragons
explicitMods: Fire Damage from Hits Contributes to Shock Chance instead of Flammability and Ignite Magnitudes
Cold Damage from Hits Contributes to Flammability and Ignite Magnitudes instead of Chill Magnitude or Freeze Buildup
Lightning Damage from Hits Contributes to Freeze Buildup instead of Shock Chance
flavorText:
"The ice seared his naked feet
As the lightning stilled his heart,
But it was the flames upon his lover's face
That roused him to vengeance."
- From 'The Three Dragons' by Victario of Sarn

name: The Unborn Lich
flavorText:
In ghastly pits beneath the world,
Kulemak grows countless new bodies,
each more powerful than the last.
Not all of his abominations survive.

name: The Unleashed
explicitMods: (15-25)% of Damage taken from Hits bypasses Energy Shield if Energy Shield is below half

Gain 1 Runic Binding on Hit with Spells, no more than once every 0.5 seconds
Lose all Runic Bindings when you Shapeshift to gain that much Unbound Potential
flavorText:
His latent potential unleashed itself, a beast
bursting from its shackles. Each strike of Farrow's
hammer rang out a song for the First Ones.

name: The Vertex
flavorText:
"A queen should be seen, admired, but never touched."
- Atziri, Queen of the Vaal

name: The Vile Knight
explicitMods: Deal (4-4)% increased Damage with Hits to Rare or Unique Enemies for each second they've ever been in your Presence, up to a maximum of 200%
flavorText: Familiarity breeds contempt.

name: The Wailing Wall
explicitMods: Can Block damage from all Hits
flavorText: Some stories are never told.

name: The Whispering Ice
explicitMods: +(5-7) to Level of all Cold Spell Skills
Inflict Elemental Exposure on Hit, lowering Total Elemental Resistances by (50-60)%
flavorText:
"From what beast you derived, we can only fathom.
Aye, you of living ice, rotting gill, and untold nightmare!
We Brinerot return ye to the sea."
- Weylam Roth

name: The Wicked Quill
explicitMods: Spells have a (25-25)% chance to inflict Withered for 4 seconds on Hit
flavorText:
With a flick of the finger, their fates are written,
the pages torn to a million pieces.

name: Thief's Torment
explicitMods: Gain (25-25) Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks
Gain (15-15) Mana per Enemy Hit with Attacks
(-50--50)% reduced Duration of Curses on you
flavorText:
The ring I stole,
My finger they took,
A shrouded mind,
Cut their curses short,
As I drained their spirit
And stole their soul.
A blessing is often a curse.

name: Threaded Light
flavorText:
A gift, a braid, of golden hair.
The war, forgotten.
The reason, remembered.

name: Thrillsteel
flavorText:
We may fight, and we may die, but in these
moments of blood and battle, we truly live.

name: Thunderfist
explicitMods: Adds (77-111) to 106 Lightning Damage to Unarmed Melee Hits
+(0.1-1.1).66% to Unarmed Melee Attack Critical Hit Chance
flavorText:
The roar of the heavens
Strikes more than fear
Into the hearts of Man

name: Thunderstep
flavorText:
Where legends tread,
the world hearkens.

name: Tidebreaker
explicitMods: +(2-3) to Level of all Melee Skills
All Damage from Hits with this Weapon Contributes to Chill Magnitude
flavorText:
The sea strikes the rock relentlessly.
Whether in one day or in ten thousand years,
eventually the rock will crumble,
and the Brine King's domain will grow.

name: Titanrot Cataphract
flavorText:
Not the sound of thunder on the wind, but the
rhoaback riders—death charging from the sands.

name: Trampletoe
explicitMods: Deal (30-30)% of Overkill damage to enemies within 2 metres of the enemy killed
flavorText: The truly mighty are never outnumbered.

name: Treefingers
explicitMods: Adds (12-16) to 12 Physical Damage to Attacks
flavorText:
The largest beings on Wraeclast
are not flesh and blood.

name: Trenchtimbre
explicitMods: +(1-2) to Level of all Minion Skills
Increases and Reductions to Minion Attack Speed also affect you
flavorText:
Ezomyte loyalty was not given to distant leaders.
It was earned by comrades in arms.

name: Trephina
explicitMods: Always deals Critical Hits against Heavy Stunned Enemies
flavorText: The art of surgery advances one mistake at a time.

name: Twisted Empyrean
explicitMods: (10-20)% of Damage is taken from Mana before Life
Attacks with this Weapon have Added Cold Damage equal to (10-12)% to 12% of maximum Mana
Convert (100-100)% of Fire Damage with Mace Skills to Cold Damage
flavorText: Infinite mutations over endless eons borne upon it in a singular moment.

name: Tyranny's Grip
flavorText:
The might of the Eternal Empire was formidable,
but rebels of every culture stood together as one.

name: Uhtred's Chalice
explicitMods: Lose (5-5)% Life per second while you have no Runic Ward during Effect
Mana Recovery from Flasks can Overflow maximum Mana during Effect
flavorText:
Uhtred drank. Verisium burned through his veins.
He gazed at death's face. With all his strength,
he turned instead to the stars, and witnessed Truth.

name: Umbilicus Immortalis
explicitMods: Your Life Flask also applies to your Minions
Minions cannot Die while affected by a Life Flask
flavorText:
"The power of rebirth rivals that of immortality."
- Icius Perandus, Antiquities Collection, Item 3

name: Unforeseen Consequences
implicitMods:
Adds Abysses to a Map 
(1-1) use remaining
explicitMods: 5 additional Rare Monsters are spawned from Abysses in Map
Map is overrun by the Abyssal
flavorText:
The Well was naught.
The Precursors dug too deep.
The Well always had been.

name: Ungil's Harmony
explicitMods: Your Critical Hits do not deal extra Damage
flavorText: Gentle anger, raging calm.

name: Valako's Roar
implicitMods: Used when you take Lightning damage from a Hit
explicitMods: Grants a Frenzy Charge on use
flavorText:
The sea swells, the sky thunders; two ships tilt at odds.
Flashes of light show only swinging axes... and a grin.

name: Valako's Vice
explicitMods: (100-100)% of Fire damage Converted to Lightning damage
flavorText:
Unlike the other gods, when he was born from the volcano,
Valako rode the clouds of ash into the thundering sky.

name: Veil of the Night
flavorText:
The seeds of greatness are planted in darkness,
Watered by suffering,
Tended by desperation,
And bloom steel flowers of victory.

name: Veilpiercer
explicitMods: Curses you inflict can affect Hexproof Enemies
Curses you inflict spread to enemies within 3 metres when Cursed enemy dies
Gain 1 Dark Whisper every second there is a Cursed Enemy in your Presence
(20-40)% increased Damage with Hits against targets in your Presence
flavorText:
The tribe revelled wildly, unaware that each fruit 
they ate further bound their continuity to the fog's. 
In time, the merest touch could break their reality.

name: Venopuncture
implicitMods: Adds (4-4) to 4 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitMods: Adds (9-13) to 12 Physical Damage to Attacks
All Damage taken from Hits while Bleeding Contributes to Magnitude of Chill on you
All Damage from Hits against Bleeding targets Contributes to Chill Magnitude
(10-20)% chance to inflict Bleeding on Hit
(15-25)% increased Magnitude of Bleeding you inflict
flavorText:
There is a way to survive the bite of an ice snake,
but few have the resolve to attempt it.

name: Ventor's Gamble
flavorText:
In a blaze of glory,
An anomaly defying all odds
The "unkillable" beast met the divine
And Ventor met his latest trophy.

name: Vestige of Darkness
explicitMods: Physical damage from Hits Contributes to Chill Magnitude and Freeze Buildup
Enemies in your Presence are Blinded
flavorText:
"Your covetous hands bring the Unlight
ever closer to consuming your realm."

name: Vigilant View
explicitMods: Enemies have an Accuracy Penalty against you based on Distance
flavorText:
The warriors of the Unblinking Eye moved
together as one, shoulder to shoulder.

name: Vis Mortis
flavorText:
Reap what others have sown
Muster them from their graves
Parade them for your pleasure
Zealots in mortis enslaved

name: Visage of Ayah
flavorText:
Tale-women do not fight as dekharas.
They command a power all their own.

name: Visions of Paradise
implicitMods:
Adds Irradiated to a Map 
(1-1) use remaining
explicitMods: If Map was not previously Irradiated, completing Map adds Irradiation instead
flavorText:
"If they had ever completed the tower network,
it could have changed the face of the world..."

name: Voices
flavorText: Only a madman would ignore a god's instructions.

name: Voll's Protector
explicitMods: (25-25)% chance to gain a Power Charge on Critical Hit
flavorText:
Although a great leader during the war,
Voll proved disastrous in times of peace.

name: Voltaxic Rift
explicitMods: (100-100)% of Lightning Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
Chaos Damage from Hits also Contributes to Shock Chance
flavorText:
The eldritch storm descended upon us, and bruised lightning
rained down. Metal withered and flesh melted before its
arcane power. There was no escape, no shelter. Only despair.

name: Waistgate
explicitMods: Life and Mana Flasks can be equipped in either slot
flavorText: Clever artifice is not always complex.

name: Wake of Destruction
explicitMods: Adds (30-50) to 43 Lightning damage to Attacks
Drop Shocked Ground while moving, lasting 8 seconds
flavorText:
Tempest's power given form,
Flee before the walking storm.

name: Wandering Reliquary
explicitMods: (50-50)% of Physical Damage prevented Recouped as Life
flavorText:
Knowing she could outlast any opponent,
Wrashmin fought not to win, but to delay.

name: Wanderlust
explicitMods: Your speed is unaffected by Slows
flavorText: All the world is my home.

name: Waveshaper
explicitMods:
Increases and Reductions to Mana Regeneration Rate also
apply to Energy Shield Recharge Rate
Gain (30-50)% of Maximum Mana as Armour
flavorText:
"Move in ways your enemy does not expect.
Confuse them with elegance and grace.
They'll never see the axe coming."
- Rakiata, Chieftain of the Tasalio Tribe

name: Whisper of the Brotherhood
explicitMods: (100-100)% of Cold Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
flavorText:
Forged by the last remaining brother
to return all that was once given.

name: Widow's Reign
explicitMods:
Life that would be lost by taking Damage is instead Reserved
until you take no Damage to Life for (3-3) seconds
flavorText:
That day, both the Unblinking Eye and
their enemies stood in silence. That day,
the sky was clear, but it was raining.

name: Widowhail
explicitMods: (150-250)% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver
flavorText:
"I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."

name: Window to Paradise
explicitMods:
Inflict Elemental Exposure to Enemies 3 metres in front of you
for 4 seconds, every 0.25 seconds while raised
flavorText:
"Beyond fire, blood, and nightmare,
the Saviour will build Utopia."

name: Windscream
explicitMods: Curse Skills have (10-20)% increased Cast Speed
flavorText:
The mocking wind, a shielding spell,
The haunting screams, a maddening hell

name: Wings of Caelyn
explicitMods: Every Rage also grants 1% increased Stun Threshold
flavorText: The older brother retained calm in the midst of fury.

name: Wondertrap
explicitMods: (50-50)% increased Rarity of Items found when on Low Life
flavorText: Wonders abound at death's door.

name: Wraeclast Besieged
implicitMods:
Adds an Otherworldy Breach to a Map 
(5-5) uses remaining
explicitMods:
Breaches expand to at least (20-20) metres in radius
Breaches remain open while there are alive Breach Monsters
Breaches in Map have (-20-10)% increased Monster density
flavorText:
In his broken madness, Xesht spills forth the hordes,
reaching out to wreak pain and ruination.

name: Wulfsbane
explicitMods: Intimidate Enemies on Block for (8-8) seconds
flavorText:
The Counts of Ogham share a
legacy of cunning and power.

name: Wylund's Stake
explicitMods: Inflicts Fire Exposure when this Weapon Fully Breaks Armour
flavorText: Shaped metal never forgets the forge.

name: Xoph's Blood
explicitMods: Enemies in your Presence have (-25--25)% to Fire Resistance
flavorText:
We are his blood.
Through us he carries his burning message.

name: Yoke of Suffering
explicitMods:
Enemies take (15-20)% increased Damage for each Elemental Ailment type among
your Ailments on them
(-40--30)% reduced Duration of Ignite, Shock and Chill on Enemies
flavorText: Let the unrepentant be dragged ever downwards by the weight of their sins.

name: Yriel's Fostering
explicitMods: You can have two Companions of different types
(-60--40)% reduced Duration of Bleeding on You
flavorText:
Feed a beast and it will not hunt.
Protect it and it will not fight.
Ferocity must be learned, not taught.
It is suffering that forges the greatest warriors.

name: Zaida's Longevity
explicitMods: You can only Socket Emerald Jewels in this item
+(5-10)% to Fire and Lightning Resistances per Equipped Item with a Cold Resistance Modifier
flavorText:
The relative peace under the fledgling Empire saw
the first Sekhema to choose, in her resplendent age and
wisdom, to step down. The role of Zaitema was born.

name: Zerphi's Genesis
explicitMods: Corrupted Blood cannot be inflicted on you
(50-50)% of charges used by Charms granted to your Life Flasks
flavorText: The most horrifying ideas often begin with a simple innovation.

name: Zerphi's Serape
flavorText:
Mortality is a curse.
The cure is simple.
